subcodes.first_line: O God! O Thou Who hast brought forth the first creation in this earthly life, Who hast split the seed, and created the soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من انشئت النشئه الاولی فی الحیوه الدنیا و فلقت الحبه و برات النسمه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for pilgrims, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
